productDisplayName: FILA Men Aspire White Sports Shoes
description: shoes from fila are made with the finest fabrics crafted in Italy's materials capital, Biella. This Aspire shoe from fila is an example of the brand's excellent craftsmanship. Referenced from the sport shoe, this low-top piece with the synthetic upper showcase the Italian brand's versatile power in innovating. Wear these with corduroy trousers and a polo T-shirt, or with your favourite jeans and a black tee.UpperMesh upper with synthetic leather overlaysPadded insole for instep comfortCentral lace upsPadded tongueReinforced overlays on the toe box and heel collarMidsoleEVA midsoleOutsoleTPU outsole with terraced grooves and flex grooves on the forefootDecoupled, scooped heel Curved midfootShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
